Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Apr-06-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura/S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Ewald O. Schlachter, Esq. for Plaintiff: Cheryl A. Furmaniak FKA Cheryl A. Alberts. Order waiving plaintiff's live testimony was filed on 4/3/06.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Steven Westley, Controller of the State of California, as follows:
Total Damages of $83,416.59.
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove Up
